hero.subtitle: Orca helps freelancers and small businesses send professional proposals, follow their sales pipeline, and understand what converts — all in one simple platform.

features.heading: Everything you need to win more business
features.subheading: From proposal creation to pipeline tracking — Orca keeps your sales organized.

create.title: Create Proposals
create.description: Build professional proposals in minutes. Share them with a single link.

share.title: Share Instantly
share.description: Send proposals via WhatsApp or a public link. Clients view and accept online.

track.title: Track Your Pipeline
track.description: See which proposals are open, viewed, approved, or lost — all in one dashboard.

close.title: Close More Deals
close.description: Understand your conversion rate, pipeline value, and revenue at a glance.

brazilian.heading: Built for the way you do business
brazilian.subheading: Orca is built for freelancers and small businesses who want a simple, modern proposal tool.

pix.title: Instant payment QR code
pix.description: Your client scans and pays right away.

whatsapp.title: Share via WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: One click and the proposal goes straight to your client's chat with a clean link.

accept.title: Online acceptance
accept.description: Your client approves the proposal in one click. No printing, no paper.

brl.title: Local currency
brl.description: Proposals in your currency with the right formatting. No conversions needed.

how.subheading: Three steps to a better sales process.
